'''âv-p-l''' ('''vapala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:healthen|healthen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-p-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:healthen|healthen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-p-l
|-
! Lemma
| vapala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vapalithi|vapalithi]] || [[word:vapaliji|vapaliji]] || [[word:vapalishi|vapalishi]] || [[word:vapali|vapali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vapaluthuth|vapaluthuth]] || [[word:vapalujuj|vapalujuj]] || [[word:vapalushush|vapalushush]] || [[word:vapal|vapal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vapaluthu|vapaluthu]] || [[word:vapaluju|vapaluju]] || [[word:vapalushu|vapalushu]] || [[word:vapalu|vapalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vapalufuth|vapalufuth]] || [[word:vapalufuj|vapalufuj]] || [[word:vapalufush|vapalufush]] || [[word:vapaluf|vapaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vapalethe|vapalethe]] || [[word:vapaleje|vapaleje]] || [[word:vapaleshe|vapaleshe]] || [[word:vapale|vapale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vapalothoth|vapalothoth]] || [[word:vapalojoj|vapalojoj]] || [[word:vapaloshosh|vapaloshosh]] || [[word:vapal|vapal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vapalotho|vapalotho]] || [[word:vapalojo|vapalojo]] || [[word:vapalosho|vapalosho]] || [[word:vapalo|vapalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vapalofoth|vapalofoth]] || [[word:vapalofoj|vapalofoj]] || [[word:vapalofosh|vapalofosh]] || [[word:vapalof|vapalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vapalĂŠthĂŠ|vapalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vapalĂŠjĂŠ|vapalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vapalĂŠshĂŠ|vapalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vapalĂŠ|vapalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vapalathath|vapalathath]] || [[word:vapalajaj|vapalajaj]] || [[word:vapalashash|vapalashash]] || [[word:vapal|vapal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vapalatha|vapalatha]] || [[word:vapalaja|vapalaja]] || [[word:vapalasha|vapalasha]] || [[word:vapala|vapala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vapalafath|vapalafath]] || [[word:vapalafaj|vapalafaj]] || [[word:vapalafash|vapalafash]] || [[word:vapalaf|vapalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vapalasha|vapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govapalasha|govapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivapalasha|gokivapalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vapalnĂŒsha|vapalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govapalnknĂŒsha|govapalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivapalnĂŒsha|gokivapalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vapalshĂ«sha|vapalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govapalnkshĂ«sha|govapalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivapalshĂ«sha|gokivapalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vapalrosha|vapalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govapalnkrosha|govapalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivapalrosha|gokivapalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vapalmusha|vapalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govapalnkmusha|govapalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivapalmusha|gokivapalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vapalsherasha|vapalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govapalnksherasha|govapalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivapalsherasha|gokivapalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vapalngasha|vapalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govapalnkngasha|govapalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivapalngasha|gokivapalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vapalyasha|vapalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govapalnkyasha|govapalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivapalyasha|gokivapalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vapalyamasha|vapalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govapalnkyamasha|govapalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivapalyamasha|gokivapalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vapalnĂŒshĂ«sha|vapalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govapalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|govapalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivapalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokivapalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vapalnĂŒrosha|vapalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govapalnknĂŒrosha|govapalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivapalnĂŒrosha|gokivapalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapalnĂŒmusha|vapalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govapalnknĂŒmusha|govapalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivapalnĂŒmusha|gokivapalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vapalshĂ«nĂŒsha|vapalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govapalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|govapalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivapalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokivapalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vapalshĂ«rosha|vapalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govapalnkshĂ«rosha|govapalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivapalshĂ«rosha|gokivapalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapalshĂ«musha|vapalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govapalnkshĂ«musha|govapalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivapalshĂ«musha|gokivapalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vapalronĂŒsha|vapalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govapalnkronĂŒsha|govapalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivapalronĂŒsha|gokivapalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vapalroshĂ«sha|vapalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govapalnkroshĂ«sha|govapalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivapalroshĂ«sha|gokivapalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vapalromusha|vapalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govapalnkromusha|govapalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivapalromusha|gokivapalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vapalmunĂŒsha|vapalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govapalnkmunĂŒsha|govapalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivapalmunĂŒsha|gokivapalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vapalmushĂ«sha|vapalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govapalnkmushĂ«sha|govapalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivapalmushĂ«sha|gokivapalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vapalmurosha|vapalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govapalnkmurosha|govapalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivapalmurosha|gokivapalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vapal|vapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:vĂŠpĂŠl|vĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovapal|hovapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hovĂŠpĂŠl|hovĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovapal|hohovapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovĂŠpĂŠl|hohovĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒvapal|nĂŒvapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒvĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŒvĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvapal|nĂŒnĂŒvapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒvĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻvapal|nĂŻvapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻvĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŻvĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvapal|nĂŻnĂŻvapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠpĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻvĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvapal|luvapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luvĂŠpĂŠl|luvĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvapal|luluvapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvĂŠpĂŠl|luluvĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livapal|livapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:livĂŠpĂŠl|livĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivapal|lilivapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivĂŠpĂŠl|lilivĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovapal|kovapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kovĂŠpĂŠl|kovĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovapal|kokovapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovĂŠpĂŠl|kokovĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevapal|kevapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kevĂŠpĂŠl|kevĂŠpĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevapal|kekevapal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevĂŠpĂŠl|kekevĂŠpĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
